---
title: "About me"
---

plant evolutionary biologist in the [Specht lab](https://blogs.cornell.edu/specht/).  
I’m interested in reproductive biology and use the Neotropical family Bromeliaceae to ask evolutionary questions.

Feel free to explore my website using the links above, and don’t forget to connect with me via social media or email (jmf425@cornell.edu).

Check out my recent iNaturalist observations:


```{asis, echo=FALSE}
<div class="widget‐row">
  <div class="inat-widget">
    <script src="https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/josh_felton.widget?layout=large&limit=5&order=desc&order_by=observed_on"></script>
    <table class="inat-footer">
      …your footer table…
    </table>
  </div>
  <div class="spotify-widget">
    <iframe
      src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/playlist/0xH1RwmBILEqvDpouq4o0T"
      width="100%" height="500" frameborder="0"
      allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture"
      loading="lazy">
    </iframe>
  </div>
</div>
